item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Each of the sticks of dynamite weren't developed enough in their brief interviews to become characters that I'm interested by, and what was apparent in the interactions with them was almost entirely shallow and one-dimensional. Each was defined almost entirely by one or two interests or traits, without real depth. While certainly unique, the concept wasn't sufficiently evocative on its own to outweigh this issue.

item.title: explosions
item.content:encoded:
I have no idea how I came up with this idea. I used to film dance competitions so maybe that explains it but otherwise no clue.

Thank You to the following wonderful people for crit: DrAkimoto, Dr. Moned, Popsioak, Sevatar/DrHawkind, D-Fish, and other in chat who assured me the idea was indeed ridiculous but not too ridiculous.
